summary: Completed testing of pagination features, direct messages, referral earnings, and invite page. Backend: 17/19 tests passed (89%). Frontend: All tested features working correctly. Pagination implemented in NetworkFeed and FollowersList but Load More buttons only appear when >20 items exist. Direct messages working - can open conversations and send messages. Invite page shows all 5 levels with correct bonus percentages. Referral earnings page displays earnings by level.

minor.issue: Endpoint is /api/auth/login with query params, not POST body - test file needed update

critical_code_review_comments: NetworkFeed.js correctly implements pagination with loadMoreGlobal and loadMoreNetwork functions
FollowersList.js correctly implements pagination with loadMore function
Messages.js sendMessage function works correctly - messages appear in chat
ReferralEarningsHistory.js shows 'Estimated Earnings' banner only when isEstimated=true (fallback data)
ReferralsEnhanced.js (Invite page) shows all 5 levels with correct percentages: 10%, 5%, 2.5%, 1.5%, 1%
Pagination uses 20 items per page - Load More button only appears when hasMore is true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pagination features implemented but Load More buttons only visible when >20 items exist. Current data has <20 items in most lists. Direct messages working - test user has conversation with Admin User. Referral earnings shows 'No earnings yet' for test user (no referrals). Invite page at /referrals shows all 5 levels correctly.

Global activity feed pagination.details: API supports page/limit params. UI shows Load More when hasMoreGlobal=true. Currently <20 items so button not visible.

Network (Following) feed pagination.details: API supports page/limit params. UI shows Load More when hasMoreNetwork=true. Test user has no following so empty state shown.

Followers list pagination.details: API supports page/limit params. UI shows Load More when hasMore=true. Admin has 2 followers so button not visible.

Following list pagination.details: API supports page/limit params. UI shows Load More when hasMore=true. Admin has 1 following so button not visible.

Direct messages - open conversation.details: Can click on conversation to open chat view. Messages displayed with timestamps.

Direct messages - send message.details: Can type and send messages. Sent messages appear as purple bubbles on right side.

Referral earnings - Estimated banner.details: Banner shows when isEstimated=true. Test user has no referrals so shows 'No earnings yet' instead.

Referral earnings - real data.details: API returns earnings data. When real data exists, no Estimated banner shown.

Invite page - Copy Code button.details: Button found and clickable. Copies referral code to clipboard.

Invite page - WhatsApp button.details: Button found. Opens WhatsApp share dialog.
